title: Vanshaj
desc: Yuvika, a talented young woman, clashes with her family over the inheritance of the family business by male members and advocates for determining the successor based on their competence.

title: Pushpa Impossible
desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

title: Wagle Ki Duniya
desc: Three generations of a middle-class family navigate the ups and downs of life and overcome their simple everyday struggles together.

title: Dhruv Tara: Samay Sadi Se Pare
desc: Princess Tara from the 17th century steps into the 21st century in search of a cure for her brother, where her fate intertwines with Dhruv, a doctor skilled in modern science.

title: Aangan Aapno Kaa
desc: After raising three children alone, Jaidev Sharma weathers the storms of seeing his daughters marry.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.
